title: senecio pongoensis
intro: Senecio pongoensis, also known as Pongo's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Senecio pongoensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Senecio pongoensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine in the Andean region of South America.
